summary: First implementation testing complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows working (login, register, onboarding, feed, detail, saved, profile, tab navigation). AI generation via Claude Sonnet 4.5 working (~10s). Minor icon warning found but non-breaking.

react_native_issues.issue: Icon name 'atom' is not valid for Ionicons. Console warning: '"atom" is not a valid icon name for family "ionicons"'. App still works with fallback.
Deprecation warning: 'TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated. Use Pressable.' Non-breaking, cosmetic warning only.

action_items: Fix icon name 'atom' in seed_facts.py CATEGORY_EMOJI - change to valid Ionicons name like 'flask' or 'beaker'
Optional: Replace TouchableWithoutFeedback with Pressable in login.tsx and register.tsx to remove deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All testIDs present and correctly implemented
✅ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
✅ Async/await used properly in all API calls
✅ MongoDB _id excluded in most queries using {"_id": 0}
✅ Error handling present in frontend and backend
✅ JWT auth working correctly with AsyncStorage
✅ Interest weighting system working as designed
✅ AI generation working (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key)
✅ All 12 backend API endpoints working correctly
✅ Data persistence verified (Create → GET pattern in tests)
⚠️ Minor: Icon name 'atom' not valid for Ionicons (non-breaking)
seed_data_creation: Test user test@test.com created via pytest fixture. Additional test user test_b1chna@test.com created during frontend registration flow test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: First implementation fully functional. Backend API tested with pytest (20/20 passed). Frontend tested with Playwright (all flows working). Only minor cosmetic issues found: (1) icon name 'atom' not valid for Ionicons - causes console warning but doesn't break app, (2) TouchableWithoutFeedback deprecation warnings. Both are LOW priority and non-breaking. AI generation working correctly with ~10s response time. All testIDs implemented correctly. App ready for production.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No critical issues found. Minor icon name issue is due to CATEGORY_EMOJI mapping using 'atom' which is not a valid Ionicons name. Ionicons v6+ uses different icon names. Recommend changing 'atom' to 'flask' or 'beaker' for Scienza category.
